Home / About Us

About Al-Ameen Integrated College

Rooted in faith, committed to holistic excellence — nurturing the leaders of tomorrow.

Our Foundation

Mission, Vision & Identity

🎯

Our Mission

To produce inspiring future leaders by creating a culture of Khairul Ummah — delivering holistic educational excellence through International and National Curriculum while holding Al-Qur'an and Sunnah as our core principles.

🌙

Our Vision

To aspire to deliver holistic educational excellence that prepares students spiritually, academically and socially for leadership roles in their communities and the wider world.

📖

Our Foundation

Al-Qur'an and Sunnah are the bedrock of everything we do at Al-Ameen. Every academic and personal development initiative is guided by Islamic principles and values.

🏫

School Type

Al-Ameen Integrated College operates as a Day and Boarding school in Abalabi town, Ewekoro, Ogun State — admitting students from Creche, Pre-School, JSS1–JSS3, and SS1 onwards.

Core Values

We RISE Together

Four pillars that define the character of every Al-Ameen student.

R
Respect
Honouring the dignity of every person — teachers, classmates, parents and community — in word and deed.
I
Integrity
Standing for truth and accountability, doing what is right even when no one is watching.
S
Sincerity
Acting with Ikhlas — pure intentions in worship, learning and every interaction.
E
Excellence
Giving our best in academics, character and service — always striving for Ihsan.
Residential Life

The Boarding Program

At Al-Ameen Integrated College, our hope is that boarders will live fulfilling, happy lives in a comfortable, spiritual and secure environment — progressing in both religious and secular learning.

One of the unique features of Al-Ameen is its boarding program. All registrations and admissions are handled personally by the Senior Management Team under strict terms, including a personal interview with the student and parents, initial assessments, and a report from the child's previous school.

Personal interview with student and parents
Initial academic and character assessments
Previous school report review
Memorization of Mutoon (Islamic texts)
Comprehensive oratory program
Spiritual and secure residential environment
Our Facilities

Learning Spaces That Inspire

Biology Lab

A well-equipped biology laboratory where students explore life sciences through hands-on experiments and discovery.

Libary

A rich collection of Islamic and secular books, creating a quiet haven for research and independent study.

Computer Lab

Modern computers and technology tools that prepare students for the digital world of the 21st century.

Health Bay

A dedicated health facility ensuring the wellbeing of all students, especially our boarding students.

Vocational Studio

Practical skills including tailoring/fashion design as part of our entrepreneurship development program.

Examination Hall

A spacious, well-lit hall designed to provide a conducive environment for assessments and examinations.

AL-AMEEN INTEGRATED COLLEGE Day & Boarding

An integrated Islamic education institution producing inspiring future leaders through holistic academic excellence and steadfast Islamic values.
